item.title: Network People Services Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 882.25
item.description: Network People Services Technologies Ltd has reached a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs 882.25, marking a significant decline amid a broader market downturn. The stock has underperformed its sector and continues to trade below all key moving averages, reflecting ongoing pressures within the Computers - Software & Consulting industry. Time: 49 minutes ago
